Lougle: calls 490 and is all-in
1TOPAIR: folds

*** SHOW DOWN ***

scorza23: shows [Th Kh] (two pair, Tens and Eights)
scorza23 collected 1020 from pot
Lougle finished the tournament in 3rd place
